description: Single full-width column. The default layout for any standalone content block.
use_when: Hero sections, standalone text blocks, banners, any content that spans the full width. DEFAULT choice when content does not require columns.

description: Two equal columns side by side (50/50 split).
use_when: Image + text pairs, two equal CTA blocks, any symmetric two-column layout.

description: Two columns: wide main (66%) on the left, narrow sidebar (33%) on the right.
use_when: Main content with a supporting element on the right. Text-heavy left side with image or CTA on the right.

description: Two columns: narrow sidebar (33%) on the left, wide main (66%) on the right.
use_when: Supporting element (image, icon, nav) on the left with main text content on the right.

description: Three equal columns side by side (33/33/33 split).
use_when: Three-item feature rows, three equal CTA blocks, three-column content grids.

description: Four equal columns side by side (25/25/25/25 split). Shows as 2×2 grid on mobile.
use_when: Four-item feature rows, four equal cards or icons, four-column content grids.

description: Five narrow equal columns (each ~20% width with offset).
use_when: Five-item icon rows, five small cards, navigation link grids with exactly five items.

description: Pre-wired section with an interactive map and a contact/hours overlay. Ships with map widget, contact info widget (phone), and hours widget already configured.
use_when: Any contact or location section. ALWAYS use this for map + hours combinations. Do NOT recreate with empty sections — pre-wired defaults are tuned for dealership context.
